transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Riverside Health Navigation Line. This is Ava, your care assistant. What's going on today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I've had a really bad headache since yesterday and now some blurry vision in my left eye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry you're dealing with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Marcus Reilly, born March 3rd, 1985.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. Besides the headache and blurry vision, any nausea, weakness, or trouble speaking?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: A little nauseous, no weakness though, and I can talk fine.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay. Sudden vision changes with a severe headache can be serious, so I'd like you to go to the nearest emergency room now rather than wait for a clinic visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Really? I was hoping to just see my regular doctor tomorrow.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, but these symptoms together need evaluation today. Riverside General ER is about ten minutes from your address on file.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Okay, I'll head there now. Should I tell them anything specific?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Tell them about the sudden headache, the vision change, and when it started. I'll also send a note to your primary doctor, Dr. Alvarez, about this visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Alright, thank you, I'm leaving now.
